caption: Hey everyone, I'm Sofia! 🌸 Nothing says spring like catching rays in Tulum and feeling like I own the sunset. ☀️ Soaked in sunlight, dripping with freedom and a little bit of mischief, this bikini set feels like my second skin. Who's ready to join me on this tropical escape? 🌴🥥 #SpringVibes #TulumLife #BikiniBodyGoals
